_comment: LM Studio mcp.json example for Clio MCP. Open LM Studio Settings, navigate to MCP, paste this configuration. Replace the env values with your own. Encryption key: generate with 'node -e "console.log(require(\u0027crypto\u0027).randomBytes(32).toString(\u0027hex\u0027))"' once and reuse. Tested with LM Studio v0.4.11 (April 2026) on macOS. CLIO_REGION accepts 'us' (default), 'eu', or 'ca'.
